document.name: solution-medical-records-summarization — Medical Records Summarization & PHI Exposure Quantification

metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow fronting the UiPath Healthcare Agentic Solution 'Medical Records Summarization & PHI Exposure Quantification'. Summarizes affected patient medical records to quantify PHI exposure scope post-exfiltration. Consumed by the Stakeholder-Parent Impact Assessment stage to populate affected_record_count, risk_classification, clinical_summary, and exposure_scope for a stakeholder customer. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: the Data Fabric refs (qem:Provider[slug=<provider_slug>]) and the live Healthcare Agentic Solution invocation are resolved at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant. Here the outputs are shaped deterministically (no random) from workflow inputs by a JavaScript/Assign activity; the connector read and the agentic-solution call are NOT hand-authored.

script.code: var slug = String($workflow.input.provider_slug || 'northstar').toLowerCase(); var day = Number($workflow.input.simulated_day || 0); var profiles = { northstar: { records: 184320, risk: 'critical', scope: '7-hospital system; emergency, oncology, and cardiology service lines', summary: 'Cross-departmental records across the Northstar Regional Health 7-hospital system show structured PHI (demographics, encounter notes, diagnosis codes) within the post-exfiltration window.' }, alpha: { records: 96450, risk: 'high', scope: 'urban academic medical center; inpatient and research cohort records', summary: 'Provider Alpha academic medical center records combine inpatient encounters with research-cohort identifiers, raising re-identification exposure across linked datasets.' }, beta: { records: 21870, risk: 'medium', scope: 'rural community hospital; outpatient and ED encounters', summary: 'Provider Beta rural community hospital records are concentrated in outpatient and ED encounters with limited specialty data, narrowing the clinical exposure surface.' }, gamma: { records: 142005, risk: 'high', scope: 'multi-state for-profit chain; cross-jurisdiction encounter records', summary: 'Provider Gamma multi-state chain records span several jurisdictions, multiplying breach-notification obligations across differing state thresholds.' }, delta: { records: 13260, risk: 'medium', scope: 'specialty surgical center; perioperative and implant-registry records', summary: 'Provider Delta specialty surgical center records center on perioperative notes and implant-registry identifiers within a contained patient population.' }, epsilon: { records: 58740, risk: 'high', scope: "children's hospital; pediatric records with minor-PHI sensitivity", summary: "Provider Epsilon children's hospital records carry pediatric minor-PHI, elevating sensitivity and guardian-notification requirements despite moderate volume." } }; var p = profiles[slug] || profiles.northstar; var escalation = day >= 14 ? Math.round(p.records * 1.25) : p.records; return { affected_record_count: escalation, risk_classification: p.risk, clinical_summary: p.summary, exposure_scope: p.scope };
